ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily statistic record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the statistic */,
  "emergency_count" INTEGER /* Total number of emergency incidents */,
  "places_count" INTEGER /* Number of emergency incidents inside places */,
  "outside_places_count" INTEGER /* Number of emergency incidents outside places */,
  "institution_count" INTEGER /* Number of emergency incidents involving institutions */,
  "media_count" INTEGER /* Number of media reports */,
  "weather_count" INTEGER /* Number of weather-related incidents */,
  "mobility_count" INTEGER /* Number of mobility-related incidents */,
  "other_count" INTEGER /* Number of other incidents */,
  "social_media_count" INTEGER /* Number of social media mentions */,
  "total_incident_duration" REAL /* Total duration of all incidents on the day (in hours) */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time for all incidents (in minutes) */,
  "average_resolution_time" REAL /* Average resolution time for all incidents (in minutes) */,
  "total_engagement" INTEGER /* Total engagement (likes, shares, comments) across all social media mentions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency incident */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily statistic record */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., fire, accident) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to respond to the incident */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to resolve the incident */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the incident */,
  "incident_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the incident (in dollars) */,
  "injury_count" INTEGER /* Number of injuries resulting from the incident */,
  "fatality_count" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities resulting from the incident */,
  "affected_population" INTEGER /* Number of people affected by the incident */,
  "resources_deployed" TEXT /* Resources deployed to handle the incident (e.g., number of fire trucks, ambulances) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_incidents_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES daily_stats ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location (people per square kilometer) */,
  "nearest_hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest hospital */,
  "nearest_fire_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest fire station */,
  "nearest_police_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest police station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the institution is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., fire department, police department, hospital) */,
  "total_staff" INTEGER /* Total number of staff in the institution */,
  "emergency_response_time" REAL /* Average emergency response time for the institution (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media report */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily statistic record */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media source */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the report */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL to the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the report received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the report was shared */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the report */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the report (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_reports_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES daily_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_reports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES media_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the media source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the media source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the media source */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the media source */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Estimated reach of the media source (number of readers or viewers) */,
  "credibility_score" REAL /* Credibility score of the media source (on a scale of 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather report */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily statistic record */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "weather_type" TEXT /* Type of weather (e.g., rain, snow, clear) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "wind_gust_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind gust speed (in kilometers per hour) */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES daily_stats ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobility_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobility pattern */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily statistic record */,
  "pattern_date" TEXT /* Date of the pattern */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Transport mode (e.g., car, bus, train) */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin location */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination location */,
  "travel_time" TEXT /* Travel time */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance in kilometers */,
  "traffic_density" REAL /* Traffic density on the travel route (on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "mode_of_transport" TEXT /* Detailed mode of transport (e.g., car, bus, train, bike) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_patterns_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES daily_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_patterns_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_patterns_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media mention */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily statistic record */,
  "mention_date" TEXT /* Date of the mention */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the social media platform */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL to the post */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_engagement" INTEGER /* Engagement (e.g., likes, shares, comments) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares on the post */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the post (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_mentions_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_mentions_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES daily_stats ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the social media platform */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the social media platform */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the social media platform */,
  "user_base" INTEGER /* Number of active users on the platform */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Average engagement rate (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., emergency responder, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the daily statistic record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES daily_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
